prompt: Generate a LEMUR CIFAR-10 classifier that improves first-epoch '{metric}' from {accuracy} toward {addon_accuracy}.
Return training hyperparameters as JSON in <hp>...</hp>, transformer code in <tr>...</tr>, and PyTorch neural network code in <nn>...</nn>.

The <nn> code must be complete and runnable, define supported_hyperparameters(), class Net(nn.Module), __init__(self, in_shape, out_shape, prm, device), forward, train_setup, and learn, and use prm['lr'] and prm['momentum'].
Output only three XML tags in this exact order: <hp>...</hp>, <tr>...</tr>, <nn>...</nn>. No markdown and no explanation.
